title: Sentinel Policy Intake
description: Policy records pushed DOWN into Sentinel by Delta via Anoryx-AI-Orchestrator (budget limits, model allow/deny lists). Every variant carries the four stable IDs from contracts/ids.md (LOCKED, IMMUTABLE) plus policy_id, policy_version, effective_from, and signature. NORMATIVE DISPATCH: variant selection is determined SOLELY by oneOf plus the policy_type const on each variant; the const values are unique and the variants are mutually exclusive, so exactly one matches a valid record. VALIDATOR DIALECT: Sentinel, Anoryx-AI-Orchestrator, and Delta MUST all validate these records with a JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 validator so no parser-differential exists. All objects are closed (additionalProperties:false) and all fields bounded, per the F-001 audit findings. SECURITY (cross-tenant poisoning defense): the body IDs (tenant_id/team_id/project_id/agent_id) are NOT authoritative. The gateway MUST resolve the authoritative scope SERVER-SIDE from the verified policy 'signature' (F-008) and REJECT any record whose body IDs disagree with the signature-resolved scope. This mirrors the virtual-API-key key-to-ID binding and id_context_mismatch rejection in contracts/openapi.yaml (ADR-0002): supplied IDs are a cross-check only and can never widen or impersonate a scope the signature does not authorize. SECURITY (replay/rollback defense): policy_version is monotonic per policy_id; intake MUST reject any record whose policy_version is <= the currently stored version for the same policy_id, so an attacker cannot re-submit an older signed policy to roll enforcement back. F-008 SCOPE: runtime cryptographic signature verification and the scope-resolve-and-reject obligation are implemented in F-008; THIS SCHEMA enforces only the PRESENCE and FORMAT of the signature field, not its validity. Full lock of this contract is gated on F-008 landing.
$comment: Dispatch is normative via oneOf + the policy_type const on each variant under JSON Schema Draft 2020-12. The 'discriminator' keyword below is a NON-NORMATIVE hint for OpenAPI tooling ONLY; it is not a 2020-12 keyword and has NO validation effect under this dialect. Do not rely on it for correctness.

tenant_id.description: Stable tenant identifier (UUID v4). LOCKED/IMMUTABLE per contracts/ids.md. NOT AUTHORITATIVE / cross-check ONLY: the gateway resolves the authoritative tenant from the verified signature server-side (F-008) and rejects any record whose body tenant_id disagrees with the signature-resolved scope.

team_id.description: Stable team identifier (UUID v4). LOCKED/IMMUTABLE per contracts/ids.md. Cross-check only; authoritative value resolved from signature server-side.

project_id.description: Stable project identifier (UUID v4). LOCKED/IMMUTABLE per contracts/ids.md. Cross-check only; authoritative value resolved from signature server-side.

agent_id.description: Internal Sentinel component name (lowercase slug). LOCKED/IMMUTABLE per contracts/ids.md.

policy_id.description: Stable policy identifier (UUID v4). Joins to policy_id on policy_violated events in contracts/events.schema.json.

policy_version.description: Monotonic version counter PER policy_id (policy_id is the monotonicity target key). Intake MUST reject a record whose policy_version is <= the currently stored version for the same policy_id (replay/rollback defense). Bounded to 9007199254740991 (JS Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER) to avoid IEEE-754 precision loss in JSON consumers. The schema enforces only the integer bound; monotonicity itself is a runtime hint until F-008 enforces it against stored state.

effective_from.description: When this policy begins to apply (RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 date-time, UTC).

signature.description: Compact-JWS cryptographic signature over the policy record (three dot-separated base64url segments), produced by Delta/Orchestrator. The body IDs (tenant_id/team_id/project_id/agent_id) are NOT authoritative: the gateway MUST resolve the authoritative tenant/team/project scope from this VERIFIED signature SERVER-SIDE and REJECT any record whose body IDs disagree with the signature-resolved scope (cross-tenant poisoning defense; mirrors contracts/openapi.yaml virtual-API-key key-to-ID binding and id_context_mismatch). SCHEMA ENFORCES PRESENCE + FORMAT ONLY (minLength 16, compact-JWS shape); a syntactically valid signature is NOT a verified signature. Runtime cryptographic verification of validity and the scope-resolve-and-reject obligation land in F-008; full lock of this contract is gated on F-008 landing. A present, well-formed, but cryptographically invalid signature MUST be rejected at runtime, not accepted because the schema validated.

BudgetLimitPolicy.description: Budget cap enforced at the gateway. Supports the Delta budget-enforcement path (throttle over-budget agents). max_cost_cents_per_period is a client-side cost estimate basis, not an authoritative bill. SCHEMA-ENFORCED: at least one of max_tokens_per_period or max_cost_cents_per_period MUST be present (see anyOf), so a budget that limits nothing fails validation.

max_tokens_per_period.description: Maximum total tokens allowed in the period. At least one of max_tokens_per_period or max_cost_cents_per_period MUST be present (enforced by the object-level anyOf); a budget limiting neither fails validation.

max_cost_cents_per_period.description: Maximum client-side cost estimate (cents) allowed in the period. Estimate basis, not an authoritative bill.

scope.description: Granularity at which the budget is enforced.

ModelAllowlistPolicy.description: Allow-list of model IDs permitted within the signed scope. Filters GET /v1/models and gates request routing in contracts/openapi.yaml.

allowed_model_ids.description: Model IDs explicitly permitted. Bounded to 512 entries to cap intake cost.

effective_until.description: OPTIONAL expiry of the allow-list (RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 date-time, UTC). Omit for no expiry.

ModelDenylistPolicy.description: Deny-list of model IDs forbidden within the signed scope. Deny takes precedence over allow at enforcement time.

denied_model_ids.description: Model IDs explicitly forbidden. Bounded to 512 entries to cap intake cost.

reason.description: Human-readable rationale for the denial (for audit-ready evidence).
